_meta.description: Permanent per-contract daily price+OI archive. Each entry carries TWO dates: price_date (N-1 biz day, when last_price settled) and oi_date (N-2 biz days, when OI was reported). last_price belongs to price_date; oi to oi_date. Sorted ascending by price_date. Retains ~5y (1320 trading days). Industry Pulse sources its price line from here.
_meta.seeded_from: oi_history.json 30-day window; price_date = oi_date + 1 biz day for seed rows
